---
description: "Use when creating or editing HTML presentation files in output/. Covers semantic structure, slide markup, headings, accessibility, and GitHub Pages-friendly relative paths."
applyTo: "output/**/*.html"
---
# HTML Presentation Rules

- Use semantic HTML elements where practical.
- Keep a clear heading hierarchy.
- Prefer slide sections with stable IDs for navigation.
- Make keyboard navigation possible when interactions are added.
- Avoid framework-specific markup.
- Use relative asset paths that work on GitHub Pages.
